data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will be replaced by a southerly airstream gradually today. The weather will be very hot over Guangdong in the next few days. Showers triggered by high temperatures will also affect the region. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the central part of the South China Sea midweek this week, and it will edge closer to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China in the latter part of this week. Showers will increase gradually over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will move across the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands today and tomorrow. It will then move in the general direction of the seas south of Japan.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260601","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Isolated thunderstorms at first.
